title: athyrium filix-femina f. ellipticum
intro: Athyrium filix-femina f. ellipticum, also known as lady fern, is a variety of the common lady fern plant species that is native to Europe, North America, and Asia, characterized by its elliptical fronds. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Athyrium filix-femina f. ellipticum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Athyrium filix-femina f. ellipticum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
